nasb.text: and those who weep, as though they did not weep; and those who rejoice, as though they did not rejoice; and those who buy, as though they did not possess;

esv.text: and those who mourn as though they were not mourning, and those who rejoice as though they were not rejoicing, and those who buy as though they had no goods,

cnv.text: 哀哭的要像不哀哭的，快樂的要像不快樂的，買了東西的要像一無所得的，

ccb.text: 哭泣的，要像不哭泣的；欢喜的，要像不欢喜的；置业的，要像一无所有的。

csbs.text: 哭泣的，要像没有哭泣的；快乐的，要像没有快乐的；买了东西的，要像没有什么的；
